## **ER1.3.  SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **ER1.3.1. ROMATSA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE ROMANIA EN ROUTE CHARGING ZONE IN 2025**

ROMATSA reported a net gain of +61.3 MRON, as a combination of a gain of +31.7 MRON arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a gain of +29.6 MRON arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism.

### **ER1.3.2. ROMATSA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) FOR THE EN ROUTE ACTIVITY**

Ex-post, the overall RR taking into account the net gain from the en route activity mentioned above (+61.3 MRON) and the actual RoE (+59.0 MRON) amounts to +120.3 MRON (8.1% of the en route revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 25.9%, which is higher than the 12.7% planned in the PP.

### **ER1.3.3. NOTES** 

#### **ER1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **ER1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**

# **TZ1. TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE - ROMANIA ZONE 1**
